text:
Once upon a time, in the heart of a lush, enchanted forest, there was a small, yet magnificent oak tree named Eldric. Eldric was special because he was the guardian of the forest's secret garden, where the most beautiful flowers bloomed only under his watchful gaze.

One crisp autumn morning, as the leaves began to whisper their last songs to the ground, a tiny kitten with luminous green eyes appeared at the edge of the garden. The kitten was lost and frightened, and she was called Qwen—a name that would soon become synonymous with magic and mystery.

Qwen had come from the distant mountains, following a path that led her through dark forests and over cold, rocky peaks. Her fur was damp from the journey, and her little paws were trembling. She found shelter under an old, weathered log near the garden.

Eldric noticed the trembling form beneath the log and, with a gentle rustle of leaves, revealed himself. His bark was warm and
